schema.purpose: Provenance for every numeric computation used by Jyotish Yantra. Each entry maps an internal function/concept name to its classical basis, confidence, alternatives and invalidation caveats.
schema.note: Verse numbers are approximate / chapter-level references until Pandit-verified. confidence must be 'high' only after verification.

sources.name: ephemeris_planets

description.en: Geocentric apparent tropical longitudes of Sun through Saturn plus mean nodes; converted to sidereal with ayanamsa.
description.hi: भू-केन्द्रित स्पष्ट ग्रह-देशान्तर (सूर्य से शनि तक + मध्यम राहु-केतु), अयनांश से सायन बनाया गया।

sources.invalidation: Currently uses a Moshier-style JS approximation; sub-arcminute accuracy is not guaranteed. Professional verification requires Swiss Ephemeris upgrade.

sources.name: ayanamsa_lahiri

description.en: Sidereal offset between tropical and sidereal zodiacs using Lahiri/Chitrapaksha formula.
description.hi: सायन और निरायन राशिचक्र के बीच का अन्तर (लाहिरी/चित्रापक्ष विधि)।

sources.invalidation: Ayanamsa choice shifts all sign/house boundaries by up to 1–2 degrees; different traditions use different values.

sources.name: ascendant

description.en: Rising degree of the ecliptic at birth; converted to a whole-sign lagna and optionally Placidus/Sripati cusps.
description.hi: जन्म-काल में उदित राशि-चक्र; पूर्ण-राशि लग्न और वैकल्पिक प्लासिडस/श्रीपति चलित।

sources.invalidation: Ascendant changes sign roughly every 2 hours; exact birth time must be reliable.

sources.name: nakshatra_pada

description.en: Lunar mansion and quarter from Moon's sidereal longitude (13°20′ per nakshatra, 3°20′ per pada).
description.hi: चंद्र के सायन देशान्तर से नक्षत्र और चतुर्थांश (13°20′ प्रति नक्षत्र, 3°20′ प्रति पाद)।

alternatives: Abhijit inclusion / exclusion in some traditions
sources.invalidation: Pada depends on precise Moon longitude; small ephemeris errors can shift the pada.

sources.name: lordOfHouse

description.en: Determines the planet ruling each whole-sign house from the ascendant sign.
description.hi: लग्न राशि से पूर्ण-राशि भावों के स्वामी (Aries→Mars, Taurus→Venus, etc.)।

sources.invalidation: Whole-sign lordship may differ from cusp-based lordship used in KP or Placidus systems.

sources.name: dignity

description.en: Evaluates exaltation, debilitation, own sign, moolatrikona and friendship for a planet in a sign.
description.hi: किसी राशि में ग्रह का उच्च, नीच, स्वगृह, मूलत्रिकोण, मित्रादि स्थिति-बल।

sources.invalidation: Moolatrikona degrees and friendship classifications vary slightly across texts.

sources.name: combust

description.en: Checks whether a planet is within the Sun's combustion orb (approximate canonical values).
description.hi: ग्रह सूर्य की अस्त-सीमा के भीतर है या नहीं (पारंपरिक मान)।

alternatives: Different orbs per planet in Phaladeepika / Saravali
Cazimi (within 1°) as strong instead of weak
sources.invalidation: Combustion orb varies by text; current values are approximations. Cazimi (very close conjunction) can reverse weakness.

sources.name: neechabhanga

description.en: Detects classical cancellation conditions for a debilitated planet: debilitation lord in kendra, exaltation lord in kendra, exchange, D9 exaltation, etc.
description.hi: नीच ग्रह के भंग की शर्तें: नीचेश/उच्चेश केन्द्र में, परिवर्तन, D9 उच्चता आदि।

sources.invalidation: Different texts enumerate different cancellation conditions; not all authorities agree on strength restoration.

sources.name: viparitaRajayoga

description.en: Detects when a dusthana (6/8/12) lord occupies another dusthana, forming a Viparita Raja Yoga.
description.hi: जब दुस्थान (6/8/12) का स्वामी दूसरे दुस्थान में हो तो विपरीत राजयोग।

alternatives: Some authorities require association with benefics or kendra for full results
sources.invalidation: Pure placement is not enough; the planet's strength, dignity and dasha activation determine manifestation.

sources.name: pstrength

description.en: Quick strength approximation combining dignity, house position, combustion and retrogression.
description.hi: स्थिति, भाव, अस्त और वक्री को मिलाकर त्वरित ग्रह-बल अनुमान।

sources.invalidation: This is a simplified score, not full six-fold Shadbala. For rigorous strength, use full shadbala or Ashtakavarga.

sources.name: shadbala

description.en: Aggregates Sthanbala, Digbala, Kalabala, Cheshtabala, Naisargikabala and Drik (aspectual) bala.
description.hi: षड्बल: स्थान, दिग्, काल, चेष्टा, नैसर्गिक और दृक्-बल का संमिश्रण।

alternatives: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra detailed virupa calculation
sources.invalidation: Current implementation is a streamlined JS approximation; canonical virupa (rupa) units and full component tables are not yet implemented.

sources.name: ashtakavarga

description.en: Eight-fold bindu system: each planet contributes benefic dots to signs from its own position; summed into Sarvashtakavarga.
description.hi: अष्टकवर्ग: प्रत्येक ग्रह अपनी स्थिति से शुभ बिंदु देता है; कुल सार्वास्टकवर्ग।

sources.invalidation: Current implementation uses a standard benefic-point table; subtle differences exist across classical commentaries.

sources.name: divisional_charts

description.en: Calculates sign placements in Navamsa, Dashamsa, Shashtiamsa and other vargas.
description.hi: नवांश, दशांश, षष्ट्यांश आदि वर्गों में राशि-स्थिति।

sources.invalidation: Varga interpretation requires careful synthesis; a single varga should not override the D1 chart.

sources.name: vimshottari_dasha

description.en: 120-year nakshatra-based planetary period system from Moon's nakshatra at birth.
description.hi: जन्म-काल चंद्र-नक्षत्र से 120-वर्षीय ग्रह-दशा-क्रम।

sources.invalidation: Dasha results depend on planet strength, signification and current transits; the period table alone is not the prediction.

sources.name: transit

description.en: Current planetary positions relative to natal Moon / ascendant; used for sadesati and trigger analysis.
description.hi: वर्तमान ग्रह-स्थिति की जन्म-कुंडली से तुलना; साढ़ेसाती और ट्रिगर-विश्लेषण के लिए।

sources.invalidation: Transit effects are secondary to dasha and yoga; a malefic transit often matters only when the relevant dasha also supports it.

sources.name: sadesati

description.en: Saturn transit over natal Moon and the 12th/2nd signs from it, lasting ~7.5 years.
description.hi: शनि का चंद्र राशि, उससे 12वाँ और 2रा राशि पर गोचर — लगभग साढ़े सात वर्ष।

alternatives: Small Panoti (2½ years over Moon sign)
sources.invalidation: Effect depends on Saturn's strength, house ownership and concurrent dasha; not universally malefic.

sources.name: yogas

description.en: Identifies named yogas from planet/sign/house relationships and evaluates their strength.
description.hi: ग्रह/राशि/भाव संबंधों से नामित योगों की पहचान और बल।

sources.invalidation: A yoga must be strong, free from cancellation, and activated by dasha/transit to produce full results.

sources.name: charaKarakas

description.en: Seven/ eight variable significators assigned by descending planetary longitude: Atmakaraka, Amatyakaraka, etc.
description.hi: अवरोही देशान्तर के अनुसार सात/आठ चर कारक: आत्मा, अमात्य आदि।

sources.invalidation: Jaimini karaka assignment depends on exact degree order among planets; Rahu retrogression conventions vary.

sources.name: arudha

description.en: Reflection/appearance chart derived by counting signs from a house lord to its sign and projecting the same distance forward.
description.hi: भाव-स्वामी से उसकी राशि तक गिनकर उतनी ही दूरी आगे बढ़ाने से बनी छवि-कुंडली।

sources.invalidation: Arudha sign falls in the 1st or 7th from the original sign, special exceptions apply (Arudha cannot equal the sign itself).

sources.name: argala

description.en: Planets in 2nd, 4th, 11th and 5th from a house cause argala (support/obstruction); 12th, 10th, 3rd and 9th obstruct it.
description.hi: किसी भाव के 2, 4, 11, 5 से ग्रह अर्गल बनाते हैं; 12, 10, 3, 9 से विरोधित अर्गल।

alternatives: Special argala rules for exalted/benefic planets
sources.invalidation: Argala strength depends on natural benefic/malefic nature and orb; current implementation is a structured approximation.

sources.name: kp_cusps

description.en: Placidus cusps with KP ayanamsa; star lord / sub-lord determination for houses and planets.
description.hi: KP अयनांश के साथ प्लासिडस कस्प; भावों और ग्रहों के नक्षत्र-स्वामी और सब-लॉर्ड।

sources.invalidation: KP requires very precise birth time and ayanamsa; small errors can change sub-lord significations.

sources.name: house_lord_rules

description.en: 144 actionable rules on the effect of each house lord placed in each house, with exceptions and citations.
description.hi: 144 कार्यान्वयन-योग्य नियम: प्रत्येक भावेश के प्रत्येक भाव में होने का फल, अपवाद और स्रोत सहित।

sources.invalidation: Verse numbers are approximate until Pandit-verified; individual verses must be checked against a critical edition.

sources.name: planet_in_house_rules

description.en: 84 actionable rules on the effect of each classical planet (Sun through Saturn) placed in each of the 12 houses.
description.hi: 84 कार्यान्वयन-योग्य नियम: सूर्य से शनि तक प्रत्येक ग्रह के 12 भावों में स्थित होने का फल।

sources.invalidation: Translations/weights are synthesized from standard Parashari meaning; exact Sanskrit verses and verse numbers must be Pandit-verified before upgrading confidence to 'high'.

sources.name: planet_in_sign_rules

description.en: 84 actionable rules on the effect of each classical planet (Sun through Saturn) placed in each of the 12 signs.
description.hi: 84 कार्यान्वयन-योग्य नियम: सूर्य से शनि तक प्रत्येक ग्रह की 12 राशियों में स्थित होने का फल।

sources.invalidation: Sign effects are modified by house placement, aspects, combustion and dignity; they are a temperament layer, not the final prediction.

sources.name: career_fusion

description.en: Weighted combination of D1, D10, yogas, dasha, Shadbala, nakshatra, Jaimini, KP and cited BPHS house-lord/planet-in-house evidence into a final score.
description.hi: D1, D10, योग, दशा, षड्बल, नक्षत्र, जैमिनि, KP और उद्धृत BPHS भावेश/ग्रह-भाव साक्ष्य का भारित संगम।

sources.invalidation: Weights are configurable approximations; final interpretation must consider the full chart, dasha and current circumstances (Desh-Kaal-Patra).

sources.name: phaladeepika_rules

description.en: Selected predictive rules from Phaladeepika (yogas, conjunctions, marriage, disease) evaluated against the live chart with exceptions and citations.
description.hi: फलदीपिका से चयनित भविष्यवाणी-नियम (योग, युति, विवाह, रोग) — जीवंत कुंडली पर अपवाद और स्रोत सहित।

sources.invalidation: Verse numbers are approximate until Pandit-verified; rules are selected, not exhaustive.

sources.name: saravali_rules

description.en: Selected predictive rules from Saravali (Panchamahapurusha yogas and planet results) evaluated against the live chart with exceptions and citations.
description.hi: सारावली से चयनित नियम (पंचमहापुरुष योग और ग्रह-फल) — जीवंत कुंडली पर अपवाद और स्रोत सहित।

sources.invalidation: Verse numbers are approximate until Pandit-verified; rules are selected, not exhaustive.
